synopsis: Amidst Sith--on--Sith violence, lone Jedi Kerra Holt persists with her near--broken mission! Trapped behind enemy lines and still eager to follow through with help for the oppressed miners on Chelloa, Kerra strikes out on her own to rid the galaxy of at least one Sith Lord. But she's still incredibly green and ruled too much by her strong feelings, and keeping her plan on track might prove to be too much for the young Jedi . . . * Follow this young Jedi heroine through an unchartered era of Star Wars. * Kerra Holt's adventure continues in John Jackson Miller's Knight Errant novel from Del Rey.
title: Knight Errant: Aflame #3
